title: Device Home Screen - Multiple devices - Turning off devices
scenario: Turning off multiple devices one by one shows each as disconnected while others remain connected
steps: Observe the display status of the turned-off device.
Check the status of the remaining devices.
Turn off the remaining devices one by one.
After each device is turned off, observe its display status.
expected: When a device is turned off, it should display as disconnected while the remaining devices stay connected. Turning off remaining devices one by one should show each as disconnected properly.
